title: AttendanceRecord.checked_in_via — canonical values
description: The five values the checked_in_via enum accepts. Each shapes the validation + fraud-signal capture during check-in orchestration.

values.description: Athlete (or guardian) checks in via a self-service kiosk at the venue. Kiosk is authenticated with a session-scoped token; the caller identifies the athlete. Requires device_fingerprint_hash for fraud correlation.
values.typical_use_case: Front-desk kiosk at a fitness academy where members badge in via a shared tablet.

values.description: Coach manually verifies each athlete from the session roster on their mobile device. checked_in_by_user_id set to the coach's user ID. Coach MUST be actively assigned to the session (validated against sports/coaching).
values.typical_use_case: Head coach ticks off athletes at the start of a Sunday practice.

values.description: Admin / reception manually records attendance from the tenant admin panel. Post-session correction path. checked_in_by_user_id set to the admin's user ID.
values.typical_use_case: Reception adds a missed check-in for an athlete who forgot to tap in at the kiosk.

values.description: Athlete's mobile app auto-checks in when GPS coordinates fall inside session.venue_geofence_radius. Requires gps_lat + gps_lng. Integrates with products/geofencing module. Requires attendance_geofence entitlement.
values.typical_use_case: Elite academy where senior athletes' phones auto-check-in when they arrive at the training complex.

values.description: Athlete scans a per-session QR code posted at the venue. Requires device_fingerprint_hash. The QR encodes the session ID + a short-lived HMAC signature validated at scan-time.
values.typical_use_case: Youth academy where each athlete's guardian scans a printed poster at drop-off to record the check-in.
